wiki.summary: Never Go Down is a song by artist slayr, released on November 5, 2025 as part of his Half Blood project. The track appears on Half Blood, which has been noted by listeners and critics as a standout in the post‑2025 underground and rage‑rap scene. “Never Go Down” by slayr was produced by waera. slayr released “Never Go Down” on November 5, 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
